depiction_rules.notes: Default to a Guruvayurappan-inspired temple murti depiction unless the stanza explicitly requires a narrative scene.

visual_bible.face: serene compassionate youthful face; almond-shaped eyes; gentle smile; consistent facial proportions
visual_bible.skin: deep blue skin (not gray, not black); soft divine glow
visual_bible.crown: peacock feather crown or head ornament; tasteful, not oversized
visual_bible.jewelry: golden jewelry; sacred ornaments; simple but regal
visual_bible.aura: warm golden halo or soft radiance

reference_images.label: Guruvayurappan murti reference (approved)
reference_images.notes: Use this as the anchor look for Guruvayurappan-style Krishna: arch, maroon/gold palette, proportions, ornaments. Do not copy exactly; match style and silhouette.

never: do not crop the peacock feather crown
do not crop hands or feet
hands must have correct number of fingers
avoid cut-off limbs at frame edge
